zh.Göttingen, Hanover, Prussia, Germany: 德國海因里希_普洛文次 韓諾福格廷根
zh.lifeSummary: Rixa von Werle是Henry I of Werle和Rikissa Birgersdotter Folkungaätten的女兒，於1268年出生在多易傑斯 萊奇。她於1284年1月10日與Albrecht II. der Fette von Braunschweig-Wolfenbüttel-Göttinhen結婚。他們至少是9個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1317年11月26日享年49歲。

zh-hans.Göttingen, Hanover, Prussia, Germany: 德国海因里希_普洛文次 韓諾福格廷根
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Rixa von Werle是Henry I of Werle和Rikissa Birgersdotter Folkungaätten的女儿，于1268年出生在多易傑斯 萊奇。她于1284年1月10日与Albrecht II. der Fette von Braunschweig-Wolfenbüttel-Göttinhen结婚。他们至少是9个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1317年11月26日享年49岁。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Werle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Erwin, Dieter, Heiner, Heinz.
German: from a pet form of the personal name   Werner  .

variants.name: Werner
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Otto, Hans, Erwin, Heinz, Gerhard, Ernst, Helmut, Horst, Klaus, Arno, Dieter.

German, Dutch, Polish, Czech, Hungarian, Norwegian, Swedish, and Danish: from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements warin ‘protection, shelter’ or ‘guard’ + heri, hari ‘army’. The surname of German origin is also found in Britain (compare Warner ) and France (Alsace and Lorraine). Compare Verner .
Germanized or Americanized form of Czech, Hungarian, Swedish, Danish, Croatian, and Slovenian   Verner  , a cognate or variant of 1 above.

nameMeanings.name: Rixa
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: Rixa von Werle was born in 1268, in German Empire as the daughter of Henry I of Werle and Rikissa Birgersdotter Folkungaätten. She married Albrecht II. der Fette von Braunschweig-Wolfenbüttel-Göttinhen on 10 January 1284. They were the parents of at least 9 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 26 November 1317, at the age of 49.

fr.lifeSummary: Rixa von Werle est née en 1268, à Deutsches Reich, fille de Henry I of Werle et Rikissa Birgersdotter Folkungaätten. Elle a épousé Albrecht II. der Fette von Braunschweig-Wolfenbüttel-Göttinhen le 10 janvier 1284. Ils ont eu au moins 9 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 26 novembre 1317, à l’âge de 49 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Rixa von Werle wurde 1268 in Deutsches Reich, als Tochter von Henry I of Werle und Rikissa Birgersdotter Folkungaätten geboren. Sie hat am 10. Januar 1284 Albrecht II. der Fette von Braunschweig-Wolfenbüttel-Göttinhen geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 9 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 26. November 1317 im Alter von 49 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Rixa von Werle è nata il nel 1268 nel Deutsches Reich come figlia di Henry I of Werle e Rikissa Birgersdotter Folkungaätten. Lei sposato Albrecht II. der Fette von Braunschweig-Wolfenbüttel-Göttinhen il 10 gennaio 1284. Erano genitori di almeno 9 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 26 novembre 1317, all'età di 49 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Rixa von Werleは1268年にデウトシェス レイチでHenry I of WerleとRikissa Birgersdotter Folkungaättenの娘として生まれた。1284年1月10日にAlbrecht II. der Fette von Braunschweig-Wolfenbüttel-Göttinhenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも9人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1317年11月26日に49歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Rixa von Werle(은)는 1268년 데우츠체스 라이치에서 Henry I of Werle(와)과 Rikissa Birgersdotter Folkungaätten의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1284년 1월 10일 Albrecht II. der Fette von Braunschweig-Wolfenbüttel-Göttinhen(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1317년 11월 26일 49세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Rixa von Werle nasceu em 1268, em Império Alemão filha de Henry I of Werle e Rikissa Birgersdotter Folkungaätten. Ela casou-se com Albrecht II. der Fette von Braunschweig-Wolfenbüttel-Göttinhen em 10 de janeiro de 1284. Eles tiveram pelo menos 9 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 26 de novembro de 1317, com 49 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Rixa von Werle родилась в 1268 г. в местности деуцчесь раич. Её родителей звали Henry I of Werle и Rikissa Birgersdotter Folkungaätten. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Albrecht II. der Fette von Braunschweig-Wolfenbüttel-Göttinhen 10 января 1284 г. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла 26 ноября 1317 г. в возрасте 49 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Rixa von Werle nació en 1268, en Deutsches Reich como hija de Henry I of Werle y Rikissa Birgersdotter Folkungaätten. Se casó con Albrecht II. der Fette von Braunschweig-Wolfenbüttel-Göttinhen el 10 de enero de 1284. Fueron padres de por lo menos 9 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 26 de noviembre de 1317, a la edad de 49 años.
